description: Multi-step state-machine desync — limit-overrun via timing-of-checks, two-window edges (Kettle 2024)

limit_overrun.description: Resource creation / quota / counter increment fires before validation latch closes the window

probes.payload: <send same mutating request N=20 in single H2 packet, then read state>
probes.description: Single-packet burst hits the state-machine before any validation closes — surplus side effects = overrun

two_window_edge.description: Operation valid in window-A leaks into window-B if state transition is not atomic (e.g. cancel-during-checkout)

probes.description: Concurrent advance + cancel — non-atomic transition leaves entity in invalid state
